constraints.layout_style: unstyled div soup with inline styles only

required_complexity_patterns.notes: When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient
Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words
Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span
Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers
Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root

reference_templates.title: Split span label fragments
reference_templates.notes: Label text split across multiple span elements
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Split label spans

reference_templates.title: Duplicate name attributes
reference_templates.notes: Two distinct fields share the same name attribute (invalid but seen in the wild)
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Duplicate name attributes

reference_templates.title: Duplicate element IDs
reference_templates.notes: Two inputs share id="email" - tests disambiguation by name or DOM order
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Duplicate element IDs

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, large, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient Required: Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words Required: Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span Required: Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers Required: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root Reference DOM (Split span label fragments): Label text split across multiple span elements Reference DOM (Duplicate name attributes): Two distinct fields share the same name attribute (invalid but seen in the wild) Reference DOM (Duplicate element IDs): Two inputs share id="email" - tests disambiguation by name or DOM order Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: native-select-not-combobox, glued-label-text, aria-labelledby-hidden, split-phone, shadow-host. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: unstyled div soup with inline styles only. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Split span label fragments; Duplicate name attributes; Duplicate element IDs.
